description.value:
A massive warbow that requires exceptional strength to draw, launching arrows with enough force to knock armored knights from their feet. A favorite of elite archers and siege specialists.

Training Levels

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Heavy, Ranged d8 (100/400), Piercing. Requires STR 13.
BasicTwo-Handed, Heavy, Ranged d10 (200/800), Piercing, Punch, Trip. Requires STR 13.
MasterTwo-Handed, Heavy, Ranged d10 (200/800), Piercing, Punch, Trip, Mighty Blow. Requires STR 13.
Master PerkMighty Blow: the target must save against Knockback. Flying creatures have disadvantage on this saving throw.

rmeData.masterPerk: Mighty Blow: the target must save against Knockback. Flying creatures have disadvantage on this saving throw.
